name: Chocolat Au Rhum Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil food cake with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
2. Mix the cake according to the package directions.
3. Spread the batter evenly in a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
4. Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the center springs back when touched.
5. Cool right side up on a wire rack for about 15 minutes.
6. For the rum syrup, blend together equal parts light corn syrup and light rum in a small bowl.
7. Slowly pour half of the rum syrup mixture over the cooled cake in the pan.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely.
9. Turn the cake upside down onto a serving plate.
10. Pour the remaining rum syrup over the cake.
11. Let stand several hours before serving.
12. Serve with Cool Whip, if desired.
